2. KUSAKILILA   
Iwu Mukanda Wakulombola Ntañishi hamwakutañishila atudizi amu Fomu 1 
wunasonekewi kuhitila mukuhumañana-humañana nakuhanjeka nanowu 
ezhima akwatahu makasa hansañu zhamashikola. Kwadiñi kuhumañana 
nawantu, mazanvu ninyitayi yamboka kulonda kutambula yitoñozhoka yawu 
hantanjikilu yantañilu yamu Lunda Fomu 1 nakuyinka nawa mpinji 
yakushimuna yitoñozhoka yawu hela munafwili kumonawu muniwu 
mukanda. Hakachi kawu hadiñi; Antañishi amumashikola awatudizi anyanya 
nakulaku dehi, Antañishi kufuma kumashikola Ansukula na Muñoñi, Mazanvu 
emenañaku yuma yamboka yatañishewaña mumashikola, Nyitayi yadimena 
yabula kukundama kunfulumendi nizanvu damatuña akwashaña ituña da 
Zambia. 
Mukukunkulula, nalemeshi nyidimu nikudihana kwawa nkoñi kuchibalu cha 
Curriculum Development Centre, azatili nañovu nakumona chikupu neyi 
mudimu wezhima wakundama kukusoneka kwaniwu Mukanda 
Wakulombola Ntañishi wunazatewi nakushika kunsa. 
 
Charles Ndakala (Dr.) 
Director- Curriculum Development 
MINISTRY OF EDUCATION

6 
 
3. KULUMBULULA  
Iwu Mukanda Wakulombola Ntañishi amu Fomu 1 wunaloñeshewi 
nukusonekewa nakashinshi kakeni kulonda kuyikwasha kutañisha zhindizilu         
zhamwidimi da Lunda muniyi nloñeshelu yinahimpewi. Iwu mukanda 
anawusoneki kwesekezha nantanjikilu yamu 2023, yazhakutañisha atudizi 
Idimi da Lunda yetezhewa, yemena hakumona neyi atudizi anelukishi kwila 
yuma yinakukuhwelelewawu kuzata. 
Mukanda weniwu wunafwili kukehesha kukala kwafuma hakubula 
kwanyikanda yakuzatisha yetezhewa nakukwasha nawa antañishi nayuma 
yayeni yakuzatisha, zhakwila nizha kweseka nachi atudizi zhaloñeshewa 
kweseka nachipimu chawu muntañilu niyuma yinatweshi kukeñekawu. 
Wunu mutayi wanfulumendi, weluka kukala kwenzaña hakuhimpika 
nakutachika nloñeshelu yantañilu yayiha yinemeni hakumona neyi atudizi 
anelukishi yuma yinakukuhwelelewa mudi wena. Kutonda nloñeshelu ya 
Competence Based Curriculum (CBC) diku kutachika kwachintapu chakuya 
kumbidi mukulumbulwisha kushikilamu nakulema kwantañilu.

7 
 
4. MWATELA KUWUZATISHILA IWU MUKANDA 
Muniwu mukanda mudi yuma yezhima yatela kutañishewa mu Temu 2 yamu 
Fomu 1. Mukanda weniwu wunambulewi munyitu yansañu dichi nawa mutu 
himutu wansañu wudi nayuma yakutañisha muyibalu yamboka, yidi neyi 
Kuhosha Nakutiyilila, Kutaña, Mazu Akutaña, Kutaña Nakanañachima, 
Mwaya Idimi, Kubalumuna Nsañu ni Kusoneka. Iyi yuma yakutañisha 
yinasonekewi muniwu mukanda hizhindizilu zhinaloñeshewuku ilaña yatela 
kuzatishewa kulonda kuloñesha nikusoneka nachi mwakutañishila zhindizilu.  
NZHILA YAKUTAÑISHILAMU YINAFUUKULEWI 
Mpinji himpinji yiwunakutañisha, watela kuzatisha nukulondela zhinzhila 
zhakutañishilamu atudizi zhamboka-mboka. Dichi, wunatweshi kuzatisha 
zhinzhila zhimu hakachi kanizhi: 
 Kuhema yisela (Role-play). 
 Kuzata nyidimu yamboka-mboka kuhitila mukuhema yisela (kuhema-
hema yisela yamboka/ drama). 
 Kusanda-sanda nakuwana wunsahu walala hanyitu yansañu 
yamboka-mboka (Research). 
 Kutaña kuhitila mukukeña-keña kulonda kuwana wunsahu walala 
hanyitu yansañu yamboka-mboka (Discovery). 
 Kutaña kuhitila mukuhanjeka (Discussion). 
 Kusoneka nsañu zhazhila (Short Stories). 
 Kutuña zhinsañu, tuyisela nizhakutañisha zhikwawu kuzatisha 
kompiyuta. 
Kubombelahu, kwekala nawa nitutufuta tukwawu twakutañishilamu twatela 
kuzatishayi ntañishi hakwila yatweshi kutañisha atudizi amboka-mboka 
awanikaña mukilasi yatañishañayi. Antañishi eluka tuyisela-sela twatuvulu 
kwesekezha nanochu chayitañishawu mukudiza kwawu kumashikola 
amuñoñi (College).

NSAÑU 1: KUHANJEKA 
Kulumbulula 
Zhidi muniwu mutu wansañu 
Iwu mutu wansañu wunakuya nakutala hayihosha. Yihosha yeniyi yikwikala 
hansañu yidi yezhima yinakwati hachihandilu hela hakuhanda kwamuntu. 
Nsañu zhenizhi chiña zhidi neyi kuhimpika kwayuma muluzwizu, kuzatisha 
yitumbu nayuma yashetana munzhila yaluwa, kukasunuka kwamuntu niyuma 
yikwawu yidi neyi yeniyi. 
Muniyi nsañu mudi yibalu yansañu yitanu. Mudi chibalu chakuhosha 
nakutiyilila. Munichi chibalu, mudi mutu wansañu wakuhanjeka nimutu 
wansañu wanyanya wakuditadikisha. Ichi chibalu chakuhosha nakutiyilila 
chikukwashaku atudizi kudiza kuditiyilila wumu namukwawu, kuditadikisha 
munzhila yayiwahi, kudiza idimi, kwikala nayitoñozhoka yakunama, kukwasha 
atudizi kwikala ahamuka mukunhosha neyi adi mudantu nikudiza kuzatila 
hamu. 
Muchibalu chakutaña mudi nyitu 
yansañu: Mazu akutaña, kutaña 
kwakunama, nikutañila hewulu. Mudi nawa nyitu yansañu yanyanya yidi 
neyi; mwalumbulukila mazu, kutaña nakanañachima nikutaña kwakuwahi. 
Kutaña kwakuwahi kukukwashaku atudizi kukulukila hakuwana nsañu 
munyikanda 
lufuchi-lufuchi, 
kutaña 
nsañu 
yamboka-mboka 
nikutaña 
kwakufumisha wudi. Kutaña mazu nimwalumbulukilawu chikukwasha atudizi 
kuzatisha mazu munyikuku yamazu. Mutu wansañu wakutaña kwakunama 
mudi mutu wansañu wanyanya wakutaña nakanañachima. Iwu mutu 
wukukwashaku atudizi kutaña nsañu yahachipimu chawu nakuyitiyishisha 
nikwakula malwihu akuyinkawu. Iwu mutu wukukwashaku nawa cheñi atudizi 
kutaña nsañu kufuma munyikanda yamboka-mboka. Mumutu wansañu 
wakutañila hewulu mudi mutu wansañu wanyanya wakutaña kwakuwahi. 
Iwu mutu wansañu wukukwashaku atudizi kutaña nsañu chachiwahi 
nakubula kuhudekela. 
Muchibalu chakusoneka mudi mutu wansañu wakusoneka chituñi chansañu 
yakulumbisha. Ichi chikukwashaku atudizi kusoneka nsañu zhamboka-mboka 
nikutoñozhokela heneni. 
Muchibalu cha Mwaya Idimi mudi mutu wansañu wamazhina, mudi nawa 
nyitu 
yansañu 
yanyanya 
yiyedi: 
Ntuñilu 
yamazhina 
ninhoshelu. 
Iyi 
yikukwashaku 
atudizi 
kwiluka 
hatela 
kuzatishila 
nhoshelu 
zhamboka, 
kusoñamisha muntu nikuhemba chisemwa. 
Muchibalu chakubalumuna nsañu mudi mutu wansañu wanyanya wanzhila 
zhakubalumwinamu nsañu. Ichi chibalu chikukwashaku atudizi kwiluka nzhila 
zhakuzatisha hakubalumuna nsañu.

Kutaña nsañu  
Yitumbu yashetana yidi neyi heloyini, damba ni kokeni yikweti lukisa lweneni 
muwumi wamuntu. Antu ezhima azatishaña yuma yashetana anatweshi 
kuwanika nakukala kwamboka. Yuma yeniyi yinatweshi kukisañana muchima 
wachida 
ambanda, 
woñu, 
mapwapwa 
ninshiya. 
Yuma 
yashetana 
yinatweshi kuletesha muntu kukata musoñu wamuchima. Woñu wamuntu 
nawa wunatweshi kuluwañana nakuletesha kusupa, kuzaluka hela kukisika 
chikupu. Antu azatishaña yuma yashetana kuhitila muzhindoñu adishaña 
hatoka namusoñu wakozomba.  
Yuma yeniyi yashetana ayizatishaña kudi akatata nawakamama nawa. Neyi 
mukamama wudi nevumu wukwikalaña nachipepa chakuzatishaña yuma 
yashetana mpinji yezhima, eluki nindi yuma yeniyi yinatweshi kukwata hadi 
mwana wudi mwivumu. Dichi mwana nawa wukwikala nakukala mukukula 
kwawoñu nimuzhimba. 
Muntu wazatishaña yuma yashetana waletaña kukala kweneni muchituñilu. 
Neyi muntu nekali dehi nachaaku chakuzatishaña yuma yashetana, 
natweshi kwila chuma chidi chezhima. Natweshi kwiya, kwetana hela 
kuzhaha muntu nakumutambula yuma yindi. Mpinji zhikwawu natweshi 
kuzatisha mali nakwinka akwawu kulonda eleña yuma yabula kutelela

17 
 
mukuhanda kwawantu. Chakuhalwa nawa, yuma yashetana yaleteshaña 
antu kutuña mazanvu awantu abula kukeña kuzata hela kutaña, makombi, 
ambazhi abulaña kukwasha chituñilu. 
Dichi twatela kuwana nzhila yakukañeshelamu yilwilu yeniyi. Nzhila yidi neyi 
kutañisha anyikwenzi awamayala nawambanda hakukala kwenzaña

1. Last Saturday, my mother and I went to visit Kangwa children’s home in

Kutaña  
Ifuku dimu nawufuku, antwansi ezhima ahamukala wa Chitewula ayili kudi 
nkaka yawu nawufuku. Wezhima wawu ayili nakutiyilila nsañu yadiñi 
nakushimunayi. Nkaka yawu wadiñi nakushimuna nsañu ya Kapela na 
Muntu. Wayilezheli nindi, “Iyala wumu wayili mwisaña nakawa kindi. Kutiya 
kawa kindi kanakubola. Ona iyala wayili lufuchi kuna kwadiñi kawa kindi. 
Chashikiliyi, wamweni kapela weneni nankashi wudi kumutondu.  
Ona iyala hahosheluhu izu hela dimuku. Chihaleheli chantesha, ona iyala 
wahosheli nindi, “Ami kanda nimoneñahu dehi kapela wudi neyi iwu.” Kutiya 
Kapela nindi, “Neyi kanda wumoneñahu dehi kapela wudi neyi ami, komana 
dimbukaku heseki wufwi.” Ona iyala wadimbukili heseki nakufwa. Kawa kindi 
wenzhili nakunona kahuma kankaka yindi nakuvwala. Kutiya Kapela nindi, 
“Neyi kanda wumoneñahu dehi kapela wudi neyi ami, komana holokaku 
kumutondu nakufwa kulonda nkaka yami yasañuki. Kapela waholokeli heseki 
nakufwa. Ona iyala wahindukili. Dichi, wafuntili hamu nakawa kindi 
kumukala.

Wazhimona na Nyakalumbu 
1. A Wazhimona na Nyakalumbu ashakamini nyaka yayivulu chakubula 
kukwata kuñozhi. Mafuku amavulu esekeli kuya kudi ayimbuki 
nakutambula yihemba yalusemu, ilaña yihemba yayinkeleñawu 
hiyayikwashileñaku. Nyaka yawu yezhima yashakaminuwu, ahandili 
nachikela chakwikala 
anshita. Ifuku dimu, antu 
adihayaminini 
hakumona Nyakalumbu nemani dehi mumukala. Antu amavulu 
amweneña neyi mahemu, ilaña kweseka kutala yinjikizhilu yadiñi 
nakumwekeshayi, atachikili kukuhwelela nawu chalala yuma yinawahi. 
Yinjikizhilu yidi neyi kusanza, kusakula yakuda nikukamuzhoka, hiyadiñi 
yakuyamba muntuku. Antu ezhima elukili chikupu nawu chalala 
Kalumbu nemiti. 
2.  Chashikili ifuku dakusampuluka, ampapishi akabakeni nindi hama. 
Kwadiñi nikufwa nikuhanda. Kweseka naluwi lwambala lwayomweni 
Chinyawezhi, Nyakalumbu washaliluhu. Hela chochu, kwadiñi chuma 
chimu chakomwesheli antu,  Nyakalumbu wasemeni iteta. Ampapishi 
hakumona neyi Nyakalumbu nasemi dehi iteta, kosi hela niwumu 
watwesheli kuhoshahu izu.   
3. Mukulumpi Wazhimona chamukalilili hakutiya nawu ñodindi nasemi 
iteta. Chumichi chaleteli nsonyi nikusawuka kweneni nankashi. Antu

LESSON GOAL: Describing a person.  
RATIONALE: This lesson is on Descriptive Writing and is particularly focused on 
describing a person. Through brainstorming, exploration, and collaboration, learners 
will acquire a skill of describing different people correctly. This is Lesson 2 of 2 on the 
sub-topic; descriptive writing.
